title: elaphoglossum alpinum
intro: Elaphoglossum alpinum, also known as the alpine elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum alpinum include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and even show promise in inhibiting the growth of certain types of cancer cells. Elaphoglossum alpinum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the dried leaves and stems typically being used in traditional medicine.
